decision_points: IF corrective_action_cycle_time > 30_days THEN escalate to management_review
rules: Every NonconformanceReport must have root_cause documented before CorrectiveAction closure
All CorrectiveAction records must link to at least one KPI measurement
exceptions: Critical safety nonconformance: bypass standard cycle_time and trigger immediate containment within 24 hours
data_requirements: recurrence_rate: float (0-1) calculated from prior 12 months
corrective_action_cycle_time: integer (days) from open to closure timestamp
failure_modes: root_cause not addressed resulting in recurrence_rate increase
missing linkage between CorrectiveAction and KPI preventing trend calculation

agent_spec.decision_logic: On trigger receipt evaluate recurrence_rate and cycle_time against thresholds to spawn CorrectiveAction or ImprovementProject while enforcing root_cause and KPI linkage rules

sop:
# SOP — Improvement — Nonconformity and Continual Improvement
**Process ID:** ISO9001-10
**Framework:** ISO 9001:2015 | **Domain:** ISO 9001
**Generated:** 2026-06-10

## Purpose
Management of nonconformities and corrective actions, continual improvement of the QMS suitability adequacy and effectiveness

## Triggers
- new NonconformanceReport received
- AuditFinding with severity >= medium
- CustomerComplaint unresolved after 7 days

## Inputs Required
- nonconformance reports
- audit findings
- customer complaints
- performance gaps
- improvement opportunities

## Process Steps
1. IF recurrence_rate > 0.15 THEN create ImprovementProject
2. IF corrective_action_cycle_time > 30_days THEN escalate to management_review

## Expected Outputs
- corrective actions
- improvement projects
- updated procedures
- lessons learned
- QMS improvements

## Business Rules
- Every NonconformanceReport must have root_cause documented before CorrectiveAction closure
- All CorrectiveAction records must link to at least one KPI measurement

## Exception Handling
- Critical safety nonconformance: bypass standard cycle_time and trigger immediate containment within 24 hours

## Success Criteria
- recurrence_rate decreased by >= 20% quarter-over-quarter
- improvement_project_completion >= 90% of planned milestones

## Compliance Requirements
- ISO 9001:2015 Clause 10
- CAPA requirements
- continual improvement mandate
test_cases: Test 1: description of happy path test
deployment_notes: Agent ready for deployment. Compliance: ISO 9001:2015 Clause 10, CAPA requirements, continual improvement mandate
